chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi, ACJ Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho, J C.P. No.D-6464 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on office objections No.18, 26 & 27. 2. For order on CMA No.27405/2022 (Exemption). 3. For order on CMA No.27406/2022 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 6th November 2023 Mr. Muhammad Arif Sheikh, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- We have heard the learned counsel for petitioner and perused the record of this case. For the reasons to be recorded later on, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed alongwith listed applications. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
